rows: Boot address only in: – RSS – or secure Flash: 0x0C00 0000 - 0x0C07 FFFF Otherwise boot address forced to RSS
Boot address only in: – RSS – or secure Flash: 0x0C00 0000 - 0x0C07 FFFF Otherwise boot address forced to RSS
Boot address only in: – RSS – or secure Flash: 0x0C00 0000 - 0x0C07 FFFF Otherwise boot address forced to RSS

If boot is configured for NSBOOTADD0 and NSBOOTADD0 in the range 0x0800 0000 - 0x0807 FFFF: boot at the address stored in NSBOOTADD0 If boot is configured for NSBOOTADD1 and NSBOOTADD1 in the range 0x0800 0000 - 0x0807 FFFF: boot at the address stored in NSBOOTADD1 Otherwise boot address is forced at 0x0800 0000
